common.private_only: 🔒 This command works best in private chat. Message me there and try again.
common.generic_error: ⚠️ I could not process that right now. Please try again in a few seconds.

language.title: 🌐 Bot language
language.body: Choose the language for bot messages, buttons and alerts.

start.welcome:
🎬 Welcome to {brand}, {name}! Find manga, manhwa and manhua right inside Telegram, with fast reading, history, favorites and offline mode.
🔎 Search by title 📖 Open chapters in a few taps ⭐ Save favorites and continue later
Type a title or use /buscar.
start.timeout: ⚠️ This request took too long. Please try again in a few seconds.
start.duplicate: ⏳ This request is already being processed.
start.cooldown: ⏳ Wait a moment before repeating this action.
start.ref_ok: ✅ Referral registered. Keep using the bot so it can be reviewed.
start.ref_self: This is your own referral link, so it does not count.

search.how_to: 🔎 How to search Send /buscar manga title or simply type the title in private chat. Example: Solo Leveling
search.loading: 🔎 Searching the library... This usually takes just a few seconds.
search.no_results: ⚠️ I could not find that title right now. Try another name or spelling variation.
search.too_short: ⚠️ Type at least 2 characters to search.
search.timeout: ⚠️ The search took too long. Please try again in a few seconds.
search.error: ⚠️ I could not load this search right now. Please try again in a few seconds.
search.cooldown: ⏳ Wait a moment before repeating this search.
search.inflight: ⏳ This search is already being processed.

help.text: 📚 Help - {brand} 🔎 Search Use /buscar title or type the title in private chat. 📖 Read Open a title, choose a chapter and read in the MiniApp. ⭐ Extras /mperfil - reading profile /plano - offline plans /indicacoes - affiliate program /idioma - change language

plan.title: 📥 My offline plan
plan.no_plan: You do not have an active plan on {brand} yet. Choose a plan below to unlock offline downloads.
plan.choose: Choose a plan below to unlock offline PDFs and EPUBs.

referral.title: 💸 Baltigo Affiliate Program
referral.body: Turn your referrals into commissions inside Telegram. 📊 Your performance 💰 Available: {available} ⏳ Pending: {pending} 📈 Valid sales: {sales} 🚀 You refer, they subscribe, and commission is calculated automatically. After the guarantee period, the amount becomes available for Pix withdrawal.
